{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Management Officer (PMO)",
  "description": "Polaris Digitech Limited is a location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software and decision support services to fulfill its client&rsquo;s strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Management Officer (PMO)
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Reports To: Project Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly skilled and tech-savvy Project Management Officer with experience in managing IT-related projects.
	The ideal candidate will work with the Project Manager to oversee fieldwork and follow up on projects using effective project management tools to track progress and development


Responsibilities


	Participate in the contract review process and assist in translating agreed Terms and Conditions into project deliverables.
	Effectively communicate delegated project goals and objectives as defined by the Project Manager.
	Identify project risks and maintain a risk register.
	Support the development, implementation, and monitoring of mitigation plans.
	Assist the Project Manager, Project Accountant, and Administrative Manager in preparing project status reports and internal/customer progress reports.
	Support the Project Manager, Administrative Manager, and Finance Manager in maintaining purchase orders, particularly regarding variations, order tracking, and change management.
	Comply with company and/or project-specific procedures for reporting progress and issues to meet customer and organizational requirements.
	Develop and manage project plans and reports.
	Participate in budget preparation for each project in collaboration with the Project Manager, Administrative Manager, and Finance Manager.
	Manage and facilitate the flow of essential information among team members.
	Maintain project calendars and milestones.
	Implement and administer quantitative staffing models developed by management to define resource levels for projects based on execution requirements.


Qualifications and Skills


	BSc / HND in Business Administration, Computer Science, Geography, or a related discipline.
	Maximum of 2 years of post-qualification experience in project management.
	Exposure to IT solution projects in a multidisciplinary environment.
	Sound knowledge of project management processes and the ability to deploy applications.
	Familiarity with project management metrics and evaluation techniques.
	Good understanding of commercial and financial processes in projects.
	Membership or affiliation with a recognized project management body or relevant certification is an advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@polarisdigitech.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Project Management Officer (PMO) Job at Polaris Digitech Limited




        
    

        
        Polaris Digitech Limited is a location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software and decision support services to fulfill its client’s strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Management Officer (PMO)
Job Location: Lagos
Reports To: Project Manager

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly skilled and tech-savvy Project Management Officer with experience in managing IT-related projects.
	The ideal candidate will work with the Project Manager to oversee fieldwork and follow up on projects using effective project management tools to track progress and development


Responsibilities


	Participate in the contract review process and assist in translating agreed Terms and Conditions into project deliverables.
	Effectively communicate delegated project goals and objectives as defined by the Project Manager.
	Identify project risks and maintain a risk register.
	Support the development, implementation, and monitoring of mitigation plans.
	Assist the Project Manager, Project Accountant, and Administrative Manager in preparing project status reports and internal/customer progress reports.
	Support the Project Manager, Administrative Manager, and Finance Manager in maintaining purchase orders, particularly regarding variations, order tracking, and change management.
	Comply with company and/or project-specific procedures for reporting progress and issues to meet customer and organizational requirements.
	Develop and manage project plans and reports.
	Participate in budget preparation for each project in collaboration with the Project Manager, Administrative Manager, and Finance Manager.
	Manage and facilitate the flow of essential information among team members.
	Maintain project calendars and milestones.
	Implement and administer quantitative staffing models developed by management to define resource levels for projects based on execution requirements.


Qualifications and Skills


	BSc / HND in Business Administration, Computer Science, Geography, or a related discipline.
	Maximum of 2 years of post-qualification experience in project management.
	Exposure to IT solution projects in a multidisciplinary environment.
	Sound knowledge of project management processes and the ability to deploy applications.
	Familiarity with project management metrics and evaluation techniques.
	Good understanding of commercial and financial processes in projects.
	Membership or affiliation with a recognized project management body or relevant certification is an advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Product Manager",
  "description": "Zojatech Limited is a digital transformation consultancy and software development company that provides revolutionary and effective software solutions to businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Description


	Product Manager is responsible for defining and executing the product vision, strategy, and roadmap in alignment with business objectives and customer needs.
	The role oversees the full product lifecycle from ideation to launch ensuring timely delivery of high-quality solutions that drive growth and customer satisfaction.
	The position combines product ownership and Agile leadership by managing and prioritizing the product backlog, facilitating Scrum ceremonies, removing team impediments, and fostering a culture of collaboration and continuous improvement.
	Acting as the key liaison between business stakeholders and the development team, the role ensures alignment, transparency, and effective cross-functional&nbsp;collaboration across engineering, design, sales, and marketing teams.
	Additionally, the role tracks product performance metrics, gathers customer and market insights, and continuously optimizes product offerings to maximize value delivery and business impact.


Responsibilties
Product Management &amp; Strategy:


	Define and communicate a compelling product vision and strategy that aligns with company goals and customer needs.
	Create and maintain a detailed product roadmap, prioritizing initiatives that drive business growth and customer satisfaction.
	Conduct market research, customer interviews, and competitive analysis to gather insights and inform product decisions.
	Drive the product lifecycle from ideation through to delivery, ensuring timely and successful product launches and iterations.
	Collaborate with key stakeholders, including engineering, design, sales, and marketing teams, to ensure product alignment across the organization.
	Lead a product management team in which you motivate and achieve steady improvements in your area
	Identification and promotion of high potential and talents
	Participate and oversee all Product activities (Solution Architecting and Technology Sales) activities of the company.
	Participate and directs the teams in ensuring right and cost-effective solution is proposed to customers at every time.
	Directs the team to support sales in achieving company technology financial targets.


Scrum Master Responsibilities:


	Facilitate all Scrum ceremonies (daily stand-ups, sprint planning, sprint reviews, retrospectives), ensuring the team remains focused and productive.
	Act as a servant leader to the Scrum team, fostering collaboration, communication, and continuous improvement within the team.
	Identify and remove obstacles that impede the team&rsquo;s progress, ensuring they have what they need to succeed.
	Guide the team in embracing Agile principles, promoting self-organization and accountability.
	Track and report on team progress, ensuring sprints stay on track and goals are met.


Product Ownership:


	Own and prioritize the product backlog, ensuring clear and well-defined user stories, features, and acceptance criteria.
	Work closely with stakeholders and the development team to refine requirements and clarify features.
	Continuously adjust the backlog based on feedback, evolving priorities, and data-driven insights.
	Make critical decisions regarding feature prioritization and scope during sprint cycles to maximize value delivery.
	Ensure that the product meets business requirements, customer expectations, and quality standards.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Serve as the key liaison between business stakeholders and the development team, ensuring alignment and transparency on goals and priorities.
	Work with product designers, engineers, and other cross-functional teams to drive timely and successful product releases.
	Communicate progress, milestones, and product performance to senior leadership and other stakeholders.
	Lead the planning and execution of go-to-market strategies, collaborating with marketing, sales, and customer support teams to ensure successful product adoption.


Performance &amp; Continuous Improvement:


	Define and track key product performance metrics, including customer adoption, engagement, and retention.
	Collect and analyze customer feedback and performance data to identify areas for improvement.
	Continuously optimize the product based on data insights, customer needs, and market trends.
	Foster a culture of continuous improvement within the Scrum team and product management processes.


Job Specifications
Academic Qualifications, Professional Qualifications and Experience (Appendix 1)
Awareness:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business, Engineering, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in product management roles
	Good understanding of what is involved in an area of expertise and its relevance to the business.
	Strong understanding of product development and product management processes, methodologies, and tools.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to communicate effectively with stakeholders at all levels.
	Strong analytical skills and experience using data to drive decisionmaking.
	Strong project management and team management skills.


Relevant professional qualifications:


	Strong understanding of product development and product management processes, methodologies, and tools.


Dimensions
Skills &amp; Competencies:
The competence proficiency levels required for the position of Product Manager are defined using the following key terms:


	Analytical thinking &ndash; Mastery
	Presentation Skills - Mastery
	Interpersonal skills - Mastery
	Communication &ndash; Mastery
	Business Skill - Mastery
	Functional Technical Leadership &ndash; Mastery
	Credibility - Mastery
	Adaptability- Skill
	Teamwork &ndash; Mastery
	Self-Motivation - Mastery:


Definition of competence levels is in Appendix 1:


	Ability to describe the main elements of the area of expertise and their importance to the business; and
	Ability to recognize how and where competences in expertise are relevant to their own job.


Knowledge:


	Ability to interpret and evaluate information and advice from experts in an area of Expertise.
	Knowledge and ability to correctly use the terminology (vocabulary) of the area of Expertise.
	Ability to hold an informed debate with experts in the Area of
	Expertise; and Ability to ask questions that test the viability of proposals in an Area of Expertise.


Skill:


	Ability to consistently carry out the activities of an area of
	Expertise to the required standard.
	Ability to perform satisfactorily majority of activities of the Area of Expertise.
	Ability to translate guidelines and standards for the Area of Expertise into practical actions.
	Ability to solve imaginatively common technical /operational problems in the Area of Expertise, and
	Ability to guide and advise others in operational /technical aspects of the Area of Expertise.


Mastery:


	Ability to diagnose and resolve significant, unusual problems and to successfully adapt aspects of an Area of Expertise.
	Ability to creatively solve significant, complex, non-routine problems in the Area of Expertise.
	Ability to adapt practices from other markets or countries for use in the Area of Expertise; and
	Ability to generate substantial improvements to local practices and procedures for the Area of Expertise.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career@zojatech.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Zojatech Limited"

Product Manager Job at Zojatech Limited




        
    

        
        Zojatech Limited is a digital transformation consultancy and software development company that provides revolutionary and effective software solutions to businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Description

	Product Manager is responsible for defining and executing the product vision, strategy, and roadmap in alignment with business objectives and customer needs.
	The role oversees the full product lifecycle from ideation to launch ensuring timely delivery of high-quality solutions that drive growth and customer satisfaction.

	Identify and remove obstacles that impede the team’s progress, ensuring they have what they need to succeed.
	Guide the team in embracing Agile principles, promoting self-organization and accountability.
	Track and report on team progress, ensuring sprints stay on track and goals are met.

	Own and prioritize the product backlog, ensuring clear and well-defined user stories, features, and acceptance criteria.
	Work closely with stakeholders and the development team to refine requirements and clarify features.
	Continuously adjust the backlog based on feedback, evolving priorities, and data-driven insights.
	Make critical decisions regarding feature prioritization and scope during sprint cycles to maximize value delivery.
	Ensure that the product meets business requirements, customer expectations, and quality standards.

	Communicate progress, milestones, and product performance to senior leadership and other stakeholders.

	Define and track key product performance metrics, including customer adoption, engagement, and retention.

	Continuously optimize the product based on data insights, customer needs, and market trends.
	Foster a culture of continuous improvement within the Scrum team and product management processes.

	Minimum of 5 years of experience in product management roles
	Good understanding of what is involved in an area of expertise and its relevance to the business.
	Strong understanding of product development and product management processes, methodologies, and tools.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to communicate effectively with stakeholders at all levels.
	Strong analytical skills and experience using data to drive decisionmaking.
	Strong project management and team management skills.


Relevant professional qualifications:


	Strong understanding of product development and product management processes, methodologies, and tools.

The competence proficiency levels required for the position of Product Manager are defined using the following key terms:


	Analytical thinking – Mastery
	Presentation Skills - Mastery
	Interpersonal skills - Mastery
	Communication – Mastery
	Business Skill - Mastery
	Functional Technical Leadership – Mastery
	Credibility - Mastery
	Adaptability- Skill
	Teamwork – Mastery
	Self-Motivation - Mastery:


Definition of competence levels is in Appendix 1:


	Ability to describe the main elements of the area of expertise and their importance to the business; and
	Ability to recognize how and where competences in expertise are relevant to their own job.


Knowledge:


	Ability to interpret and evaluate information and advice from experts in an area of Expertise.
	Knowledge and ability to correctly use the terminology (vocabulary) of the area of Expertise.
	Ability to hold an informed debate with experts in the Area of
	Expertise; and Ability to ask questions that test the viability of proposals in an Area of Expertise.


Skill:


	Ability to consistently carry out the activities of an area of
	Expertise to the required standard.
	Ability to perform satisfactorily majority of activities of the Area of Expertise.
	Ability to translate guidelines and standards for the Area of Expertise into practical actions.
	Ability to solve imaginatively common technical /operational problems in the Area of Expertise, and
	Ability to guide and advise others in operational /technical aspects of the Area of Expertise.


Mastery:


	Ability to diagnose and resolve significant, unusual problems and to successfully adapt aspects of an Area of Expertise.
	Ability to creatively solve significant, complex, non-routine problems in the Area of Expertise.
	Ability to adapt practices from other markets or countries for use in the Area of Expertise; and
	Ability to generate substantial improvements to local practices and procedures for the Area of Expertise.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Channel Accounting Executive - Shop",
  "description": "Airtel Nigeria (Airtel Networks Limited) is a leading telecommunications services provider in Nigeria, headquartered in Lagos, the commercial nerve-centre of Nigeria. The telco ranks amongst the top four mobile service providers in terms of subscribers, with a customer base of more than 39.8 million. The company&#39;s product offerings include 2G, 3G, and 4G wireless services, mobile commerce, and enterprise services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Channel Accounting Executive - Shop

Job Identification: 762
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	The purpose of the role is to primarily account for proper shop accounting and control management


Responsibilities
Monthly Reporting:


	Ensure that monthly Group closure reporting is done without error in line with the SLA.
	Ensure accurate and timely preparation of the month-end journals in line with the group calendar.


Shop Reconciliations:


	Ensure daily reconciliation of ERC pretup to the billing system (SnD).&nbsp;
	Ensure daily 3-way reconciliation of showrooms (Showroom invoice vs Receipt vs Value in Bank reconciliation)
	Ensure 100% reconciliation of showroom deal code accounts


Shop Control:


	Ensure clearance of the ERC purse within 2 hours of receipt of approval from Revenue Assurance.
	Daily recycling of MDSA stock within 1 hour of receipt of approval from Revenue Assurance.
	Ensure prompt ERC reversal request upon receipt from RA within 1 hour of receipt.
	Ensure that all cheques deposited at the shops are lodged and the value given.


Accounting/GL Hygiene:


	Ensures bi-weekly reconciliation of SnD sales to GL
	Ensure daily reconciliation of activation to sales
	Ensure daily reconciliation of SnD vs ASI for shop accounts


Requirements
Educational Qualifications:


	First degree in a related field
	A professional qualification like ICAN is required&nbsp;


Relevant Experience &amp; Functional / Technical Skills:


	Minimum of 3 years of experience in FMCG &amp; Telecoms
	In-depth knowledge of the telecoms industry is an added advantage
	Strong customer - centric skills
	Strong Analytical skills &amp; MS Excel proficiency.


Other requirements:


	High level of commitment
	Result-oriented and good analytical skills.
	Strong financial analysis and reporting skills
	Good communication skills
	Ownership and a positive can-do spirit.
	High energy and a good team player.
	Attention to detail and the ability to translate financial data into usable business intelligence.
	Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment with frequently changing priorities and to meet deadlines under pressure.

Channel Accounting Executive - Shop Job at Airtel Nigeria




        
    

        
        Airtel Nigeria (Airtel Networks Limited) is a leading telecommunications services provider in Nigeria, headquartered in Lagos, the commercial nerve-centre of Nigeria. The telco ranks amongst the top four mobile service providers in terms of subscribers, with a customer base of more than 39.8 million. The company's product offerings include 2G, 3G, and 4G wireless services, mobile commerce, and enterprise services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Channel Accounting Executive - Shop

Job Identification: 762
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The purpose of the role is to primarily account for proper shop accounting and control management


Responsibilities
Monthly Reporting:


	Ensure that monthly Group closure reporting is done without error in line with the SLA.
	Ensure accurate and timely preparation of the month-end journals in line with the group calendar.


Shop Reconciliations:


	Ensure daily reconciliation of ERC pretup to the billing system (SnD). 
	Ensure daily 3-way reconciliation of showrooms (Showroom invoice vs Receipt vs Value in Bank reconciliation)
	Ensure 100% reconciliation of showroom deal code accounts


Shop Control:


	Ensure clearance of the ERC purse within 2 hours of receipt of approval from Revenue Assurance.
	Daily recycling of MDSA stock within 1 hour of receipt of approval from Revenue Assurance.
	Ensure prompt ERC reversal request upon receipt from RA within 1 hour of receipt.
	Ensure that all cheques deposited at the shops are lodged and the value given.


Accounting/GL Hygiene:


	Ensures bi-weekly reconciliation of SnD sales to GL
	Ensure daily reconciliation of activation to sales
	Ensure daily reconciliation of SnD vs ASI for shop accounts


Requirements
Educational Qualifications:


	First degree in a related field
	A professional qualification like ICAN is required 


Relevant Experience & Functional / Technical Skills:


	Minimum of 3 years of experience in FMCG & Telecoms
	In-depth knowledge of the telecoms industry is an added advantage
	Strong customer - centric skills
	Strong Analytical skills & MS Excel proficiency.


Other requirements:


	High level of commitment
	Result-oriented and good analytical skills.
	Strong financial analysis and reporting skills
	Good communication skills
	Ownership and a positive can-do spirit.
	High energy and a good team player.
	Attention to detail and the ability to translate financial data into usable business intelligence.
	Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment with frequently changing priorities and to meet deadlines under pressure.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
